title: Independence Mall
alt: The Liberty Bell pavilion at golden hour beneath living green towers and an elevated transit line.
blurb: The Liberty Bell pavilion beneath living towers and an elevated line.

title: Reading Terminal
alt: Reading Terminal Market reimagined as a vertical farm with basil walls and year-round produce.
blurb: The market as a vertical farm — basil walls, year-round harvest.

title: Rooftop City
alt: The Philadelphia skyline at dusk seen from a planted rooftop, a delivery drone over the river.
blurb: Skyline at dusk from a green rooftop, drone inbound over the bridge.

title: Benjamin Franklin Bridge
alt: The Benjamin Franklin Bridge regrown with green-lit towers, low-altitude transit, and river fog.
blurb: The bridge regrown — green-lit towers, low transit, river fog.

title: The Riverfront
alt: A riverfront boardwalk at sunset beneath an elevated transit line, lit by lanterns and gardens.
blurb: A boardwalk at sunset beneath an elevated line, lanterns and gardens.
